artPrompt: The explosive moment of a gambler's spell: a searing bolt of ember-orange fire lancing toward an unseen target while a silver coin spins blazing at the apex of its flip, sparks raining over a feral town square. A single fierce light from the blast carves the smoke and the goblin gambler's exhilarated face from the surrounding night-black chaos. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Double or Nothing
text: Double or Nothing deals 3 damage to any target. Then flip a coin. If you win the flip, you may repeat this process.
flavorText: The house always wins. Tonight, the mayor is the house.
